summary: Hardened fulfillment-task.integration.test.ts from 20 to 45 tests: added blockFulfillmentTask/unblockFulfillmentTask/cancelFulfillmentTask coverage, stale task detection (new findStaleFulfillmentTasks query), reason-required validation, terminal state rejection, all query filter tests, and concrete assertions on every returned field including oldStatus/newStatus for event tracking
